nasb.text: And He has filled him with the Spirit of God, in wisdom, in understanding and in knowledge and in all craftsmanship;

esv.text: and he has filled him with the Spirit of God, with skill, with intelligence, with knowledge, and with all craftsmanship,

cnv.text: 又用　神的靈充滿他，使他有智慧，有聰明，有知識，有作一切巧工的技能。

ccb.text: 上帝的灵已经充满他，使他有聪明智慧，精于各种技能和手艺，
